title: CHESAPEAKE ENERGY CORPORATION APPOINTS JOSH VIETS EXECUTIVE VICE PRESIDENT AND CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER
text: OKLAHOMA CITY, Jan. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Chesapeake Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CHK) ("Chesapeake") today announced that Josh Viets has been appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, effective February 1, 2022. "Josh has been at the forefront of how our industry is evolving for the future, and I am excited to welcome him to the Chesapeake team," said Nick Dell'Osso, Chesapeake's President and Chief Executive Officer.
